_comment: Golden recipe for Ubuntu 24.04 LTS (noble) cloud image -- apt FAMILY, debian-family (a supported consumer family). OPERATOR must PIN upstream_sha256 to the vendor value before building (the build FAILS CLOSED until sha256sum matches): Ubuntu publishes it at https://cloud-images.ubuntu.com/noble/current/SHA256SUMS (GPG-verify SHA256SUMS.gpg against the Ubuntu Cloud Image signing key first). The seed routes the guest's apt through the SSL-bump cache proxy; archive.ubuntu.com + security.ubuntu.com must be in fleet.json mirror_allowlist (they are). Base packages only -- consumer installers pull their own deps.
